differential_diagnoses: Severe Babesiosis with secondary organ failure
next_steps: Send serum and urine for Leptospira PCR and Leptospirosis microscopic agglutination test (MAT)
Perform peripheral blood smear to evaluate for intra-erythrocytic organisms (Babesia) and schistocytes
Order Hantavirus serology and PCR, and viral hepatitis panel (HAV, HBV, HCV, HEV)
Order LDH, haptoglobin, and reticulocyte count to evaluate for hemolysis
Send blood and urine cultures (including specialized media if available for fastidious organisms)
Continue supportive care for respiratory failure (ARDS) and renal failure including hemodialysis if required
Maintain empiric coverage with intravenous doxycycline (or penicillin G) while awaiting diagnostic confirmation
